introSection: Western Loop (Japanese: ウエスタンループ) was a steel roller coaster previously located at Hamanako Pal Pal in Hamamatsu, Shizuoka, Japan. It's only inversion was a vertical loop.
fullText:
Western Loop (Japanese: ウエスタンループ) was a steel roller coaster previously located at Hamanako Pal Pal in Hamamatsu, Shizuoka, Japan. It's only inversion was a vertical loop.



White track and supports.
